# Truly Free Tools — Free PDF Tools
> Free PDF tools: compress, merge, split, convert to Word, remove password. Runs entirely in your browser via WebAssembly — files never leave your device.

## Pages
https://trulyfreetools.com/ — Homepage: free PDF tools, no upload, no watermark, no daily limits
https://trulyfreetools.com/compress-pdf — Compress PDF file size without losing quality, entirely in-browser
https://trulyfreetools.com/merge-pdf — Combine multiple PDFs into one file instantly, no upload
https://trulyfreetools.com/split-pdf — Split a PDF into separate files or extract specific pages
https://trulyfreetools.com/pdf-to-word — Convert text-based PDFs to editable Word documents, free
https://trulyfreetools.com/remove-pdf-password — Remove a password from a PDF you own, no subscription
https://trulyfreetools.com/about — About TrulyFreeTools, built by George Smith of Klickify Agency
https://trulyfreetools.com/how-it-works — Technical architecture: WebAssembly, pdf-lib, PDF.js, local processing
https://trulyfreetools.com/help — Answers to common questions about compressing, merging, splitting, converting PDFs
https://trulyfreetools.com/contact — Contact the Truly Free PDF Tools team
https://trulyfreetools.com/feedback — Rate the PDF tools and share feedback
https://trulyfreetools.com/privacy — Privacy policy: files processed locally, no uploads, no data collection
https://trulyfreetools.com/terms — Terms of service: free forever, no hidden charges
https://trulyfreetools.com/blog — Guides on PDF compression, merging, splitting, conversion, and tool comparisons
